title: Water sort in bottle puzzle
description: In Water Sort Puzzle, players must strategically combine colors within each bottle to achieve a single color per bottle. Challenge your problem-solving skills as you carefully pour and mix the hues, ensuring each container holds only one color. With increasingly complex levels, this addictive game offers a refreshing twist on the classic puzzle genre. Can you master the art of water sorting and achieve colorful harmony? Web Dev https://www.crazygamesx.com/
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
